title: Corrective fix for B-4ad21cc2-test: Test Suppress duplicate auto-followups while preserving legacy behavior
description:
Blocked reason: `uv run python -m unittest tests.test_orchestrator.DeleteBeadCliTests.test_scheduler_uses_planner_owned_shared_followups_without_creating_legacy_children -v` fails because legacy followup beads are still created (`AssertionError` at tests/test_orchestrator.py:262).

Remaining work: Update the scheduler followup-selection logic so developer beads inside planner-created feature trees reuse existing shared tester/documentation/review beads instead of creating legacy child followups, then rerun `uv run python -m unittest tests.test_orchestrator -v` or at minimum the failing followup test plus nearby scheduler followup coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-4ad21cc2-test.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
block_reason: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B-d4ab70d3
conflict_risks: Low. Follow-up work should stay isolated to `src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py`, but downstream edits must preserve the planner-owned vs legacy/manual followup behavior when changing followup selection logic.
